name: Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells decorative base papers, overlay papers, non-woven wall base papers, and flicker overlay papers in China. It also exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Shandong Qifeng Special Paper Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. in September 2013. Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is based in Zibo, China.
